ERR_AM_NOLINK: @{username} Please provide an Apple Music link or song ID!
ERR_AM_IDENTIFIER_MISSING: @{username} Please don't remove the ?i= at the end of a link — those are the song IDs. Retry your request using the full song link.
ERR_RP_SUBS_ONLY: @{username} Song requests are only open to subscribers and moderators.
ERR_SUBS_ONLY: @{username} Song requests are only open to subscribers and moderators.
ERR_RP_MODS_ONLY: @{username} Only moderators can make song requests.
ERR_MODS_ONLY: @{username} Only moderators can make song requests.
ERR_RP_CLIENT_NOT_CONNECTED: @{username} Please have the streamer @{streamer} reconnect their Request+ client.
ERR_SP_IDENTIFIER_MISSING: @{username} Please don't remove the track ID from a Spotify link — retry using the full song link.
ERR_SP_SONG_NOT_FOUND: @{username} That Spotify song couldn't be found. Please check the link and try again.
ERR_YT_NOT_FOUND: @{username} That YouTube video couldn't be found. Please check the link and try again.
ERR_SC_DISABLED: @{username} SoundCloud requests are not enabled right now. Ask the streamer to switch Request+ to SoundCloud and connect the SoundCloud bridge.
ERR_SC_IDENTIFIER_MISSING: @{username} Please provide a full SoundCloud track link.
ERR_YT_UNAVAILABLE: @{username} That YouTube video is unavailable (private, age-restricted, or region-locked).
OKAY_SC_QUEUED_UNKNOWN: @{username} Your SoundCloud track has been queued!
SR_INVALID_LINK: @{username}, sorry but I couldn't find a valid Spotify or Apple Music link in your message.
SR_UNSUPPORTED_LINK: @{username}, sorry but I couldn't find a Spotify, Apple Music, or YouTube Music link in your message.
SR_YT_NOT_SUPPORTED: @{username}, YouTube links are not supported yet. Please use Spotify or Apple Music links.
BOT_JOINED_CHANNEL: I have finally joined your channel! If you have any issues, please let us know in the Discord server linked on the website: https://requestplus.xyz
BOT_JOINING_CHANNEL: @{username} I should be joining your channel shortly!
BOT_JOINING_OTHER: @{username} I should be joining {channel}'s channel shortly!
BOT_INVITE_RESTRICTED: @{username} Sorry, only the RequestPlus team can use !invite to add me to other channels.
BOT_HELP: @{username} Hello! Welcome to the Request+ official channel! I am the chat bot responsible for providing updates and interacting with the community. Commands: !ping, !uptime, !help, !invite
CLIENT_NOT_OPEN: @{channel}, please open the Request+ client to accept requests.
ERR_SP_SEARCH_NOT_ALLOWED: @{username} Sorry, song searches are not allowed for Spotify at this time, please provide a link for Spotify for now.
OKAY_AM_SEARCH: @{username} {songName} by {artist} was found. If you want to request it, please type !sraccept in the next 10 seconds.
ERR_AM_SEARCH_FAILED: @{username} Sorry, I couldn't find that song on Apple Music. Please retry your request.
ERR_SEARCH_PLATFORM_NOT_SUPPORTED: @{username} Sorry, I only support song searches for Apple Music at this time. Please provide a link for other platforms for now.
SR_SEARCH_TIMEOUT: @{username} Your song search has expired. Please try again.
SR_NO_LINK: @{username} Please provide a link to the song you want to request.
SRHELP: @{username} Request+ commands: !sr <song/link>, !queue, !sraccept, !guess <name>, !srhelp. Mods can also use !srremove <id> and !srmod enable|disable. Request+ powers chat song requests and now playing overlays: https://requestplus.xyz
QUEUE_LINK: @{username} View the current Request+ queue here: {queueUrl}
ERR_MOD_COMMAND_MODS_ONLY: @{username} Only moderators can use that Request+ command.
ERR_SRREMOVE_NOT_MOD_QUEUE: @{username} !srremove only works when the moderation queue is enabled.
OKAY_SRMOD_ENABLE: @{username} Song requests are now open again.
ERR_GTS_DISABLED: @{username} Guess The Song is not enabled right now.
OKAY_GTS_CORRECT: @{username} Correct! You now have {points} Guess The Song point(s).
ERR_GTS_WRONG: @{username} Not quite. You get one guess per song.
OKAY_SP_SEARCH: @{username} {songName} by {artist} was found. If you want to request it, please type !sraccept in the next 10 seconds.
ERR_SP_SEARCH_FAILED: @{username} Sorry, I couldn't find that song on Spotify. Please retry your request.
SR_NO_PENDING: {@username}, Sorry, you have no pending song search requests. Use !sr to search for a song.
